title: Hit The Dummy
description: A craftable dummy for all your weapon testing needs!
body:
# A craftable dummy for all your weapon testing needs!

You can place them, break them, hit them, and make them your new best friend! Multiplayer compatible!

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1107edd9e28f2fcd0db960bc8a4ef11dd0f8c60.png)

## Installation
1. Download both the datapack and resource pack
2. Drag the datapack into the desired worlds 'datapacks' folder (this can be found by going into your .minecraft saves folder, opening your worlds folder, and finding the datapacks folder!)
3. For the resource pack, in game go to options > resource packs > click open pack folder > drag the .zip into the window that appears
4. ### Load up the world and type /reload
5. Enjoy your new friend!
